code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL='/api/workorders';export const fetchWorkOrders=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get(API_URL);return response.data;}catch(error){const msg=String(error);throw new Error('Error fetching work orders: '+msg);}};export const createWorkOrder=async workOrderData=>{try{const response=await axios.post(API_URL,workOrderData);return response.data;}catch(error){const msg=(error===null||error===void 0?void 0:error.message)||String(error);throw new Error('Error creating work order: '+msg);}};export const updateWorkOrder=async(id,workOrderData)=>{try{const response=await axios.put("".concat(API_URL,"/").concat(id),workOrderData);return response.data;}catch(error){const msg=(error===null||error===void 0?void 0:error.message)||String(error);throw new Error('Error updating work order: '+msg);}};export const deleteWorkOrder=async id=>{try{await axios.delete("".concat(API_URL,"/").concat(id));}catch(error){const msg=(error===null||error===void 0?void 0:error.message)||String(error);throw new Error('Error deleting work order: '+msg);}};
